The Whale (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,453,440Details
International Box Office $36,591,041
Worldwide Box Office $54,044,481
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,096,679
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $738,234
Total $1,834,913
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A 600-pound man who can’t leave his apartment and is estranged from his teenage daughter, wants to reconnect.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$1,038,394 (5.9% of total gross)
Legs:11.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$3,000,000 (worldwide box office is 18.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:603 opening theaters/1,721 max. theaters, 5.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,307,781

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 9th, 2022 (Oscar Qualifying Run) by A24
December 21st, 2022 (Expands Wide) by A24
International Releases: January 19th, 2023 (Limited) (Croatia)
January 27th, 2023 (Limited), released as La Ballena (Spain)
February 2nd, 2023 (Limited) (Australia)
February 2nd, 2023 (Wide) (New Zealand)
February 3rd, 2023 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: February 21st, 2023 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R language, some drug use and sexual content.
(Rating bulletin 2753 (cert #54087), 10/12/2022)
Running Time: 117 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Fat Suit
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Dysfunctional Family, Eating Disorder, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Family Drama
Source:Based on Play
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: American Empirical, A24, Protozoa Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
